title: Nightmare
global_negative: photorealistic, 3d render, western comic style, extra limbs, deformed hands, fused fingers, blurry, watermark, logo, text overlay, speech bubble, readable text, letters, numbers, low quality, chibi, equal size panel grid, uniform strip of identical boxes, more than 3 panel rows per page, crowded warmup floor, everyone in matching tracksuits, awkward raised paddles, paddle extended toward coach, floating characters, sitting poses, mid-air poses, stretched limo van, double front doors

pages.label: PAGE 1a — Arrival (1.1–1.3)
pages.prompt:
Vertical manhwa WEBTOON PAGE EXACTLY 3 panel rows 1536x1024 FULL BLEED edge-to-edge NO side letterbox thin white gutters between rows PREMIER manhwa cel shading solo leveling desaturated NO speech bubbles,

Ethan Hyun 15 dark blue shadow perm messy lean athletic match casual-front reference ONLY casual black hoodie gold headphones white backpack rows 2-3.

ROW 1 ~35% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.1: busy taekwondo tournament arena exterior dawn overcast crowds walking toward glass entrance parking lot generic tournament banners NO karate text fills frame edge to edge

ROW 2 ~35% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.2: normal standard-length black team passenger van short wheelbase parked side view ONE side door. TWO teammates standing in front of van feet on ground boy and girl white WT dobok colored belts yellow green blue red. THREE teammates standing farther toward stadium two girls one boy white dobok feet on ground standing normally. Ethan walking toward stadium away from van mid-stride casual hoodie foreground. Five dobok teammates 2 boys 3 girls NO floating NO sitting.

ROW 3 ~30% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.3: rear view Ethan black hoodie white backpack walking with crowd toward arena glass entrance doors separate row

EXACTLY 3 ROWS ONLY

pages.prompt:

ROW 1 ~25% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.4: bright tournament concourse white walls polished floor Ethan black hoodie from behind walking toward door sign MALE LOCKER block letters

ROW 2 ~40% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.6: locker room Ethan shirtless black compression shorts sitting on bench pulling on white dobok pants blue lockers

ROW 3 ~35% FULL WIDTH Panel 1.7: same locker room Ethan white dobok pants on shirtless pulling white dobok top over head NO belt yet

EXACTLY 3 ROWS separate do not merge

pages.label: PAGE 2 — Neglect & Warmup (1.7b–1.8)
pages.prompt:

Ethan Hyun — 15 dark blue shadow perm hair messy lean athletic SAME face as PAGE 1 style anchor. Match reference-sheets/output/ethan-hyun/dobok-front.png white WT dobok black belt.

Ttong Kim — stocky underbite Premier black polo tight black shorts gold watch. Match reference-sheets/output/ttong-kim/suit-front.png.

Repeul Kim — overweight brown curls multicolor floral casual large hoop earrings ONLY Repeul whispers ROW 2. Match reference-sheets/output/repeul-kim/casual-front.png.

ROW 1 Panel 1 — WIDE ~40% beat 1.7b-a: INSIDE stadium blue red mats Ethan white dobok black belt at distance standing waiting holding ONE kicking paddle naturally at his SIDE relaxed arm down NOT extending paddle LOOKING at Ttong Kim patient hopeful eyes Ttong Kim BODY TURNED AWAY from Ethan talking to OLDER master coaches glasses polo tie AND tournament parents ZERO eye contact ignoring Ethan wide shot spatial distance ONE full-width panel

ROW 2 Panel 2 — WIDE ~40% CUT beat 1.7b-b: Ethan walking AWAY alone paddle at side tired frustrated sigh shoulders slumped Ttong Kim looking over shoulder AT Ethan Repeul Kim whispering in Ttong ear mean scowl INSIDE stadium mats full-width below row 1

ROW 3 Panel 3 — QUAD-SPLIT ~20% beat 1.8: dobok only warmup montage four mini panels splits toe touches wall stretch high kick sparse gym NO hogu

STYLE PREMIER manhwa cel shading solo leveling match PAGE 1 style anchor ONLY 3 ROWS
